name: Mao Nonosaka
description:
__Occupation__: Middle School Student
__Likes__: Hinata Hino
__Height__: 160 cm

Another of Yukiteru's classmates, Mao is good friends with Hinata.

~!A willing accomplice in Hinata's scheme to kill Akise Aru. She is overly obsessed with Hinata's breast size and considers her more than a friend. Always has a camera handy.!~
